name: mail
description: Go-powered Outlook, Hotmail and Microsoft Graph mailbox manager with SQLite

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.build:server: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('build',{recursive:true})" && go build -trimpath -o build/mail-server ./server/cmd/mail && go build -trimpath -o build/bootstrap-admin ./server/cmd/bootstrap-admin
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:go
scripts.check: npm run contract:check && npm run check:desktop-source && npm run test && npm run vet && npm run typecheck
